building_code.base: International Building Code (IBC) and International Residential Code (IRC)
building_code.adoption: Adopted by City of Manhattan Code of Ordinances Chapter 8
building_code.note: City-specific MDC (Chapter 26) governs zoning and site development; Chapter 8 governs construction standards

environmental.flood: NFIP / FEMA maps — national API at runtime
environmental.state_agency: Kansas Department of Health and Environment (KDHE) for some env reviews

source_note: State-level pack is minimal; city packs hold jurisdiction-specific rules
